indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed obstructs the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: rug
indicators.rationale: The rug partially covers the floor, reducing the available open space for yoga.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: The chair is placed close to the bed, potentially obstructing the open floor space.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a firm, non-slip base surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: cabinet-merged
indicators.rationale: The cabinet is placed against the wall, reducing the available open floor space.

indicators.name: light
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be sufficient for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for yoga / stretching. While the wooden floor and lighting are positive factors, the bed, rug, chair, and cabinet obstruct the open floor space required for yoga practice. A score of 3 rather than 4 reflects the significant obstruction caused by these objects.
